\tzpentry{ID3305}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3305 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Box_g \Phi_ \text{ac} = \frac{1}{ \sqrt{-g}} \partial_ \mu \left( \sqrt{-g} \, g^{ \mu \nu} \partial_ \nu \Phi_ \text{ac} \right) = 0 \end{equation}
